summary: Reference context covers 4 relevant specs but misses 2 critical areas touched by the pre-clarifications: (1) skills/run-change.md — the mainthread skill loop must change to handle claude_subagents structured signal per Q2; (2) interfaces/tools/workflow-tools.md — sdd_run_change response schema has executor hardcoded to ["mainthread"], needs schema change for new modes.

checklist_results.item: All affected crates/areas from pre-clarifications are covered by at least one spec
checklist_results.note: Missing skills/run-change.md (HIGH — mainthread loop must invoke Claude Code Agent tool for claude_subagents mode per Q2) and interfaces/tools/workflow-tools.md (MEDIUM — executor response schema hardcoded to ["mainthread"])
All four scores accurately reflect the spec content relationship to the change

checklist_results.item: Key requirements listed per spec are accurate
checklist_results.note: Specs use section headings as key requirements (no formal R-IDs exist in these specs). All referenced sections exist in the actual spec files.
All 4 specs are directly relevant to execution mode changes

issues.description: Missing spec: skills/run-change.md — Q2 states mainthread is responsible for invoking Claude Code Agent tool for claude_subagents mode. The run-change skill defines the mainthread execution loop (current loop assumes workflow tools handle delegation internally). The loop flowchart has executor branches for mainthread/agent but needs a new subagent branch.
issues.recommendation: Add skills/run-change.md with relevance HIGH and key requirements ["Loop", "Execution Loop"]

issues.description: Missing spec: interfaces/tools/workflow-tools.md — sdd_run_change response schema has executor field hardcoded as { type: 'array', const: ['mainthread'] }. New execution modes require this schema to support subagent signals and multi-claude-agent signals.
issues.recommendation: Add interfaces/tools/workflow-tools.md with relevance MEDIUM and key requirements ["sdd_run_change executor schema"]
